Now, just know, because we have 28 days, we need to be a little bit more aggressive on the fulfillment conversion in order to get them onto EFT. So, going through the tracking sheet. So you might do seven to 10,000 steps, but still individualize it for the person because the idea is in 28 days, they're going a little bit more intensive to see the results they can get. So they should be on the carb cycling 28 day protocol. There are other protocols. If you're doing a different format, you can update this as long as you know what's going on. Wednesday, checking in on supplements, and you'll just check that box when you've checked in on them. Now, I've added one on this because it's up to you when you wanna do it, but I found in a 28 day protocol, I'd like to ask them an open-ended question about improvements they've seen without necessarily being a picture. So, hey, what's the biggest change you've seen this week? What's the biggest thing you felt different about? The goal is to every week have them put something that they've noticed different or positive about your experience. So, oh, I feel like I have way more energy. Oh, I played with my kid. I like to include this because you need to start hammering on these a little bit sooner than you would in six weeks, especially coming into the halfway. And so it also shows you care when you do that halfway abandoned hope, and you're like, oh my God, Susie, so you're playing with your kids now. You're walking around the mall. You're doing all these things good for you. It just adds one more level that you need because you don't have as much time. Now, and then Friday, doing progress pics. Mind you, they are sending you a picture of their scale week every single day. Now, for the progress pic, what you can do is in that boxer chat, you can come, find your picture. Also, one thing that I don't have on here that I think would be a lot of fun, if you are following the 28 day carb cycling protocol, would I would think it'd be fun to have them send you a picture of their cheat meal, or their carb heavy meal, and just make sure they're enjoying themselves. You will find that a lot of clients in this protocol will not do it, and so it's almost more fun for you to do it, make sure they're getting those carbs because they need them, but also ensuring that they're having some fun with it and balancing their life. They also make great marketing pieces as well. So have them ensure their meals they're enjoying in their windows, and that is the 28 day fulfillment.
